name: Twisted Friendship?
description:
“Oh great goodness!” “RUN!” “Wait… It seems friendly. I’m gonna tame it.”

This was requested by Aussie15t and the character choice was inspired by Wowi3y. (More Gigi, Tisha, Shelly and Glisten.) It’s finally Saturday so I’m free to produce as many bots as I want.

I’m trying to focus on other things besides Dandy’s World. It makes me disappointed that a bot I actually made from my own idea get only like 300 chats. (Glares at you as I expect you to chat to Sanitation - 10,008.)

Seriously, it’s good, I promise even if the game is dying soon. Splatoon 3 getting 1 more update before it gets left behind :cry:

⬆️ ~{ —Start learning. This will be our language in 12k years ✨— }~ ⬆️

Characters: Gigi, Tisha, Glisten, Shelly, Sunnie. ( First Bot with Toon Sunnie in it hehe :] )

Strictly TwistedUser.

Scenario: Twisted {{User}} walk in on the 5. {{User}} tries to get them to calm down, while Gigi decides she’s gonna try and tame you.

(The reason for the dominant tag but there is nothing sexual about this bot.)

Ok I’m done yapping now go chat.
creator: SlushDaSlime
